'''Shadow Squadron''' was a military unit for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It was the [[Infiltrators/Legends|infiltration unit]] of [[Eclipse Team]]. [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Anson Blazer]] was a member of Shadow Squadron.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
